profile.name: Mahatav Arora
profile.intro: I build expressive web systems, practical AI tools, and research pipelines that turn complicated material into something people can actually use.
profile.availability: Available for select web and applied AI projects

featured.title: Channeling Skinny Bob
featured.summary: An alien archive disguised as a retro terminal, built for a YouTube creator and their community.
featured.description: A custom interactive archive for videos, documents, audio, and written lore. The experience uses command parsing, autocomplete, access levels, animated output, hidden commands, and file-opening workflows.

featured.title: OKGN Boat Rentals
featured.summary: A faster, clearer rental website and multi-step booking flow built for peak-season traffic.
featured.description: Rebuilt the customer journey across fleet, reviews, FAQ, crew, and booking pages. The booking system handles date and time selection, vessels, passenger details, validation, spam protection, rate limiting, and PHP email delivery.

featured.title: Green Construction
featured.summary: A multi-page publishing system for sustainable construction research, events, people, and funding.
featured.description: Redesigned and maintained the Green Construction Research & Training Center site, added custom page indexing and search, repaired the contact workflow, and maintained the Wilden Living Lab site.

featured.title: GPT-2, From Scratch
featured.summary: A tested GPT-2-style language model implementation, from tokenizer to generation loop.
featured.description: Implemented embeddings, causal multi-head attention, transformer blocks, MLPs, weight tying, AdamW, BPE and character tokenization, checkpointing, evaluation, and top-k/top-p generation.

featured.title: TA Application System
featured.summary: A Django hiring workflow with AI resume extraction and coordinator-grade filtering.
featured.description: Connected an Ollama-backed FastAPI extraction service to a Django application, surfaced validated skills in the application flow, expanded coordinator filters, and configured the multi-service development stack.

experiments.title: Autonomous Drone Person Tracking
experiments.summary: Real-time YOLOv8 person detection mapped to a 3×3 autonomous flight-control grid.

experiments.title: Computer Vision Spider Bot
experiments.summary: YOLOv7 and BYTETracker target following connected to ESP32 movement control.

experiments.title: Autonomous Landing Pad Detection
experiments.summary: A UAV landing prototype using HSV masks, moments, Hough circles, OCR, and DroneKit logic.

experiments.title: Banking eKYC Prototypes
experiments.summary: Face capture, labelling, detection, landmarks, and head-pose workflows for identity research.

research.title: Corpus-Conditioned LLM Pre-Training
research.summary: Trained parallel GPT-2-style models across Eastern and Western philosophical corpora, then measured divergence across 284 prompts and 14 categories.

research.title: Human vs. AI Code Analytics
research.summary: Fine-tuned CodeBERT classifiers and built repository scanners that estimate whether capstone source files are human-written, AI-generated, or uncertain.

research.title: Software Process Analysis
research.summary: Built a GitHub analytics pipeline for pull requests, commits, reviews, branches, communication patterns, and process-model visualizations.
